channel.title: Cross-Platform on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Cross-Platform on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: How Copilot Studio uses .NET and WebAssembly for performance and innovation
item.description:
Microsoft explains how Copilot Studio uses .NET to run AI agents consistently across platforms and to bring performant, innovative agent execution to the web via WebAssembly.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: ai: Foundry Local Meets More Silicon
item.description:
Foundry Local is a high-performance local AI runtime from Azure AI Foundry that brings model execution and hardware acceleration to client devices. It enables developers to build and ship cross-platform AI apps that run accelerated models on a wide range of silicon.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
